description_long: This object is a classic cartoon-style spherical bomb with a matte black, slightly roughened metal surface. The body is nearly perfectly round, with subtle textural imperfections and a faint seam line visible in some views, suggesting it is made from cast or forged metal. At the top, there is a short cylindrical neck with a thick, twisted beige fuse protruding upward and curving to one side. The fuse appears to be made of a fibrous material, possibly cloth or paper, and is tightly inserted into the neck of the bomb. The overall finish is dark and non-reflective, with some minor scuff marks and wear visible on the surface. There are no visible markings, labels, or additional components such as buttons, wires, or timer displays.
description: A matte black, spherical metal bomb with a thick, twisted beige fuse protruding from the top. The surface is slightly rough and unmarked, with a classic cartoon-style appearance.
description_view_0: The bomb is seen from a slightly leftward angle, showing the round body, the cylindrical neck, and the fuse curving to the left.
description_view_1: This view shows the bomb from the opposite side, with the fuse curving more toward the viewer and the seam line on the body faintly visible.
description_view_2: The bomb is viewed from a slightly rightward angle, highlighting the fuse's curve and the subtle surface texture.
description_view_3: A rear view of the bomb, with the fuse curving away from the viewer and the body appearing uniformly round and dark.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: The bomb appears to be ignited by lighting the exposed fuse, which would burn down to the interior charge.
